states.name: Pass(RightStriker)
states.description: Right striker is open. Pass to right striker immediately.

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_support_space(), False)
states.description: Make a supporting run to open space after the pass.

states.name: Shoot(goal)
states.description: Attempt shot on goal after receiving ball.

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_support_space_lw(), False)
states.description: Move to a supporting position for the left winger.

transitions.condition: after 3 seconds and until λ_precondition_0(simulation(), None) and λ_precondition_1(simulation(), None)

transitions.description: Wait until right striker receives the ball.
Wait to see if right striker passes back, clear lane needed. Receive ball from right striker.
Attempt shot on goal after receiving ball.

transitions.condition: after 3 seconds and until λ_precondition_0(simulation(), None) and not λ_precondition_1(simulation(), None) and λ_precondition_6(simulation(), None)
transitions.description: Deep option not open; check if left winger can receive. Pass to left winger.
Wait until left winger receives the ball. Move to a supporting position for the left winger.
